channel.title: supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: Authentication Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Defines the security protocols and access patterns for the API. Architectural overview of the Authentication domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Connectivity Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Standardizes communication patterns between clients and servers. Architectural overview of the Connectivity domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Documentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Handles the structure and presentation of developer-facing documentation and guides. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: OpenAPI Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Defines the interface and endpoint contracts for the underlying API services. Architectural overview of the OpenAPI domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Styling Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Manages the visual identity and specific UI overrides for the documentation interface. Architectural overview of the Styling domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File
